title: Death Soul
description: A Data Pack which will leave behind a Soul containing your Items and Half of your Levels
body:
# Death Soul
I liked the **Soul-Link** mechanic from [Vanilla Refresh](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vanilla-refresh), but wanted it as a standalone version. This Data Pack does just that, plus a little extra.


## When Death Comes
Upon death, you create a Soul\
The Soul acts essentially as a "Gravestone", containing **all of your items** alongside **Half of your Levels**

![A screenshot of the Soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ea150cd1f581b0c74d553a3367dc16167b83e0.png)

The soul will go to Y:64 if you fall into the void\
If you die in lava, the soul will go the the surface of it

Souls will last **15 Minutes** before disappearing forever, so don't forget to collect your stuff!
## Retrieval
Once you respawn, You will be given a **Special Recovery Compass**.\
Upon collecting any soul, all special compasses will be removed from your inventory

Souls can however be **collected by any Player**, granting them a few Defensive buffs for 10 seconds, along with the stored Items and Levels
